holdings.infoBox: INTW is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long 2X Intc Cowen stock at 83.53%, Recv Long Intc 2x Trs Cf1 at 58.50%, Recv Long Intc 2x Trs Wf1 at 57.90%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 16.75%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 6.56%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long INTC Daily ETF (INTW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Intel Corporation (INTC) stock. INTW was launched on Feb 13, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
